title: Prism Totem Counter
description: Live totem HUD for yourself + real-time enemy pop nametag tracking — built for PvP.
body:
# Prism Totem Counter

**Prism Totem Counter** is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that gives you full totem awareness in PvP — track your own totems and watch every enemy pop happen live, right above their head.

---

## ✦ Features

### Self Totem HUD
- Displays your current totem count as a clean on-screen overlay
- Updates instantly as you consume or pick up totems
- Minimal, non-intrusive design that stays out of your way mid-fight

### Enemy Pop Nametags
- Injects a live pop counter directly into player nametags
- Every time an enemy pops a totem, their name updates with the count
- Lets you track how close enemies are to being finishable at a glance

### Session Tracking
- Pop counters persist across the full session
- Automatically resets on disconnect so each server session starts clean
- Bind the **Reset Pop Counters** key to manually wipe counts mid-session

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5c55f7c8d6dfc181622ce273a2c48897220599a_0.webp)

---

## ✦ Details

| | |
|---|---|
| **Side** | Client-side only |
| **Loader** | Fabric |
| **MC Version** | 1.21 |
| **Java** | 21+ |

---

## ✦ Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/) 0.15.11 or newer
2. Install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop `prism-totem-counter.jar` into your `mods/` folder
4. Launch and configure the keybind under **Controls → Prism Totem Counter**

---

## ✦ Part of PrismStudios

Prism Totem Counter is part of the **PrismStudios** collection of client-side PvP utility mods. Each mod is designed to be lightweight, modular, and consistent in style.
